item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 20s THE BIG READ
'Perception doesn't bother me - I don't care what people think. If you don't
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 20s THE BIG READ
'Perception doesn't bother me - I don't care what people think. If you don't like it, you don't like it - I've not done anything wrong'
Read more with RacingPost+ De racingpost.com 3

item.title:
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 1min out of
£205,000 purchase Skerry Hill extends his unbeaten record to complete a double for
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 1min out of
£205,000 purchase Skerry Hill extends his unbeaten record to complete a double for the @gelliott_racing team.
His next assignment the Grade 1 bumper at Punchestown
@ayrracecourse 3 1 212
